commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul is saying that the people whom he sent to them did not suggest that if they wanted the apostle to be welldisposed toward them they should offer him more money. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Did I make a gain of you? Did I defraud you, and extort your money from you? Or with Vatablus, Did I fleece you? Or, with Ambrose, Was I covetous towards you?
